title: teucrium webbianum subsp. pugionifolium
intro: Teucrium webbianum subsp. pugionifolium is a subspecies of the Teucrium webbianum plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin infections, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and boosted immune system. In herbal preparations, Teucrium webbianum subsp. pugionifolium is often used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and can also be added to food or used topically in a salve or cream.
